title: Clear Balloons 18 inch Large Balloon,5pcs Big Transparent Balloons Thick Natural Clear LatexBalloon Birthday PartyBalloon Stuffing Balloon HeliumBalloons for Baby Shower,Wedding Party Decorations
features: 🎈Package included: 5Pcs 18inch Matte balloons, 11 colors to choose from White,Black,Red,Pink,Orange,Transparent,Gold,Blue,Dark green,Rose red and silver. Give your boy or girl a colourful party.

🎈Party Balloons Nontoxic and Safe: 100% bio-degradable natural latex balloons , durable, beautiful, non-toxic, environmentally friendly and safe for children. Not easy to burst and 20% thicker than normal latex balloons.Each helium balloons has passed systematical test, ensuring the safety of children.

🎈Easy to blow with air or helium: Balloons can be filled with air or helium. Filling with helium can make the balloon float. You can also use the air pump to inflate the air directly and hang it with tape. Please do not let the balloon inflate more than 18 inches to avoid overinflation. (Recommended to use inflate the pump!)

🎈For different occasions: Can be used for many kinds of parties and special occasions such as Birthday Party, Hen Party, Engagement, Wedding, Anniversary, Halloween, Christmas and New Year's Eve, Valentine’s day and Baby Shower Party or any festivals.

🎈Safety and Use: Do not over-fill the balloons and avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects, and excessive friction. Strong winds or shots can cause a burst and are recommended for children over 10 years.
description: Safety and use: do not overfill the balloons and avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects and excessive friction. Strong winds or throws can cause a blowout and are recommended for children over 10 years old. PACKAGE INCLUDE - 5pcs 18 inch matte balloons, 11 colors to choose from white, black, red, pink, orange, clear, gold, blue, dark green, rose red and silver. Give your boy or girl a colorful party. NON-TOXIC AND SAFE PARTY BALLOONS - Biodegradable natural latex balloons, durable, beautiful, non-toxic, environmentally friendly and safe for children. It is not easy to burst and is 20% thicker than normal latex balloons. Each helium balloon has passed a systematic test, which ensures the safety of children. EASY TO BLOW WITH AIR OR HELIUM - Balloons can be filled with air or helium. Filling with helium can cause the balloon to float. You can also use the air pump to inflate the air directly and hang it with tape. Do not allow the balloon to inflate more than 18 inches to avoid overinflation. Recommended to use to inflate the pump For different occasions: It can be used for many kinds of parties and special occasions such as Birthday Party, Bridal Shower, Engagement, Wedding, Anniversary, Halloween, Christmas and New Year, Valentine's Day and Baby Shower Party or any festival. Safety and use: do not overfill the balloons and avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects and excessive friction. Strong winds or throws can cause a blowout and are recommended for children over 10 years old.
